templates.title: Flask Blueprint Scaffold Generator
templates.description: Generate string berisi file Flask Blueprint + routes CRUD. Tinggal simpan dan pakai.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(resource_name='{{resource_name}}', label='{{resource_label}}'):
    """Generate Flask Blueprint code as a string.
    Returns ready-to-save Python source for a CRUD blueprint.
    """
    bp_name = resource_name.lower()
    cls = label or resource_name.title()
    code = '''from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify

{bp_var} = Blueprint('{bp_name}', __name__, url_prefix='/{bp_name}')


@{bp_var}.route('/', methods=['GET'])
def list_{bp_name}():
    """List all {cls} records."""
    # TODO: implement
    return jsonify({"data": []})


@{bp_var}.route('/', methods=['POST'])
def create_{bp_name}():
    """Create a new {cls}."""
    data = request.get_json()
    # TODO: validate and save
    return jsonify({{"id": 1, **data}}), 201


@{bp_var}.route('/<int:item_id>', methods=['GET'])
def get_{bp_name}(item_id):
    """Get {cls} by ID."""
    # TODO: implement
    return jsonify({{"id": item_id}})


@{bp_var}.route('/<int:item_id>', methods=['PUT'])
def update_{bp_name}(item_id):
    """Update {cls} by ID."""
    data = request.get_json()
    # TODO: implement
    return jsonify({{"id": item_id, **data}})


@{bp_var}.route('/<int:item_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
def delete_{bp_name}(item_id):
    """Delete {cls} by ID."""
    # TODO: implement
    return jsonify({{"deleted": item_id}}), 204
'''.format(bp_var=bp_name, bp_name=bp_name, cls=cls)
    return code

templates.title: FastAPI Router Scaffold Generator
templates.description: Generate string berisi file FastAPI APIRouter dengan CRUD stubs + Pydantic model.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(resource_name='{{resource_name}}', label='{{resource_label}}'):
    """Generate FastAPI APIRouter code as a string.
    Returns ready-to-save Python source with CRUD routes + Pydantic model.
    """
    snake = resource_name.lower()
    cls = label or resource_name.title()
    code = '''from fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import List, Optional

router = APIRouter(prefix='/{prefix}', tags=['{cls}'])


class {cls}Create(BaseModel):
    name: str
    description: Optional[str] = None


class {cls}Response({cls}Create):
    id: int


@router.get('/', response_model=List[{cls}Response])
async def list_{snake}():
    """List all {cls} records."""
    # TODO: implement
    return []


@router.post('/', response_model={cls}Response, status_code=201)
async def create_{snake}(item: {cls}Create):
    """Create a new {cls}."""
    # TODO: implement
    return {cls}Response(id=1, **item.dict())


@router.get('/{item_id}', response_model={cls}Response)
async def get_{snake}(item_id: int):
    """Get {cls} by ID."""
    # TODO: implement
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Not found')


@router.put('/{item_id}', response_model={cls}Response)
async def update_{snake}(item_id: int, item: {cls}Create):
    """Update {cls} by ID."""
    # TODO: implement
    return {cls}Response(id=item_id, **item.dict())


@router.delete('/{item_id}', status_code=204)
async def delete_{snake}(item_id: int):
    """Delete {cls} by ID."""
    # TODO: implement
    return None
'''.replace('{prefix}', snake).replace('{cls}', cls).replace('{snake}', snake)
    return code

templates.title: Request Timing Middleware
templates.description: WSGI middleware yang log durasi setiap request. Bisa dipakai di Flask/Django/Falcon.
templates.code:
class {{nama_class}}:
    """WSGI middleware that logs request duration.
    Usage: app = TimingMiddleware(app)
    """
    def __init__(self, app, slow_threshold_ms={{slow_threshold_ms}}):
        self.app = app
        self.slow_threshold_ms = slow_threshold_ms

    def __call__(self, environ, start_response):
        start_time = time.monotonic()
        status_holder = [None]

        def _log_start_response(status, response_headers, exc_info=None):
            status_holder[0] = status
            return start_response(status, response_headers, exc_info)

        try:
            result = self.app(environ, _log_start_response)
            return result
        finally:
            elapsed_ms = (time.monotonic() - start_time) * 1000
            method = environ.get('REQUEST_METHOD', '?')
            path = environ.get('PATH_INFO', '?')
            status = status_holder[0] or '???' 
            level = 'SLOW' if elapsed_ms > self.slow_threshold_ms else 'OK'
            msg = '[%s] %s %s -> %s (%.1f ms)' % (level, method, path, status, elapsed_ms)
            sys.stderr.write(msg + '\n')
